tasks.subject: Task 1: RenderCore — virtual surface + upscale
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 640x360 virtual surface, nearest-neighbor upscale x2 to 1280x720, camera.scale=1/PIXEL_SCALE preserves visible-world span.

**Files:** create render/core.py; modify config.py (PIXEL_SCALE=2), render/renderer.py:32-39 (accept RenderCore or Surface), scenes/play.py:49-50,185, scenes/train.py; test tests/test_render_core.py

**Verify:** test_render_core.py PASS + full suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/core.py", "src/blueball/config.py", "src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "src/blueball/scenes/train.py", "tests/test_render_core.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_render_core.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["surface 640x360", "present upscales", "rejects indivisible", "Renderer dual-accept", "span preserved", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Theme system — dataclass + registry + config flag
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switchable Theme selected by config.ACTIVE_THEME; pixel registered by default; neon slot stubbed.

**Files:** create render/theme.py, render/themes/__init__.py, render/themes/pixel.py (palette stub); modify config.py (ACTIVE_THEME); test tests/test_theme.py

**Verify:** test_theme.py PASS + suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/theme.py", "src/blueball/render/themes/__init__.py", "src/blueball/render/themes/pixel.py", "src/blueball/config.py", "tests/test_theme.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_theme.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["default pixel", "register/get round-trip", "switch changes result", "Theme fields present", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Sprite format + baker (grid -> cached Surface)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SpriteDef bakes a grid of palette-key chars into a cached pygame.Surface; multi-frame support.

**Files:** create render/sprites.py; test tests/test_sprites.py

**Verify:** test_sprites.py PASS + suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/sprites.py", "tests/test_sprites.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_sprites.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["correct dims+SRCALPHA", ". transparent, lower=base, upper=_hi", "cached", "multi-frame frame(i)", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Pixel theme data — palette + core sprites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pixel theme palette + initial sprites (ball/spike/collectible/goal/coin) at 2x grain; remaining entities in Task 9.

**Files:** modify render/themes/pixel.py; test tests/test_pixel_theme.py

**Verify:** test_pixel_theme.py PASS + suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/themes/pixel.py", "tests/test_pixel_theme.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_pixel_theme.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["core sprites present", "all bake", "palette covers keys", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Theme-driven renderer — blit sprites not primitives
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert draw_* to blit baked theme sprites; remove _*_COLOR constants; establish blit pattern (tail in Task 9).

**Files:** modify render/renderer.py (add _blit_sprite/_theme; convert ball/spike/collectible/goal/static_segments; delete color constants); test tests/test_renderer_theme.py

**Verify:** test_renderer_theme.py PASS + legacy render tests green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "tests/test_renderer_theme.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_renderer_theme.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_blit_sprite helper", "core entities use sprites", "no _*_COLOR constants", "legacy tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Animation system (squash/stretch/spin + frame Anim)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Procedural squash/stretch + spin for ball, frame Anim helper, palette-cycle helper.

**Files:** create render/animation.py; modify render/renderer.py (draw_ball scale; _blit_sprite scale); test tests/test_animation.py

**Verify:** test_animation.py PASS + suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/animation.py", "src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "tests/test_animation.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_animation.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["squash_stretch rest/rise/area", "Anim cycles", "draw_ball scales", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Particle system, impact FX & screen shake
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capped particle pool + emit presets from scene transitions; decaying screen shake in core. No physics/entity changes.

**Files:** create render/particles.py; modify render/core.py (add_shake/update), render/renderer.py (_blit_point), scenes/play.py (own/emit/update/draw); tests tests/test_particles.py + shake in tests/test_render_core.py

**Verify:** test_particles.py PASS + suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/particles.py", "src/blueball/render/core.py", "src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "tests/test_particles.py", "tests/test_render_core.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_particles.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cap enforced", "emit/update/draw + age out", "shake decays", "scene-driven, no physics edits", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Parallax background (layered scrolling)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace flat background with N scrolling parallax layers defined in theme data.

**Files:** create render/parallax.py; modify render/renderer.py (draw_parallax), render/themes/pixel.py (layers), scenes/play.py:178; test tests/test_parallax.py

**Verify:** test_parallax.py PASS + suite green + visual check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/parallax.py", "src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "src/blueball/render/themes/pixel.py", "src/blueball/scenes/play.py", "tests/test_parallax.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_parallax.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["layer_offset wraps", "factor 0 static / 1 locked", "draw_parallax tiles layers", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Per-entity visual treatment pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Finish every remaining entity from spec section 5 (sprite + anim + FX); by-eye art pass. HUD pixel font.

**Files:** modify render/themes/pixel.py (all remaining sprites/frames + font), render/renderer.py (convert remaining draw_*); test tests/test_renderer_all_entities.py (smoke per entity)

**Verify:** test_renderer_all_entities.py PASS + full suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/render/themes/pixel.py", "src/blueball/render/renderer.py", "tests/test_renderer_all_entities.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_renderer_all_entities.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all terrain/platforms", "all hazards animated", "all pickups/interactive", "HUD pixel font", "no RGB outside palette; smoke tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Render tests, training-isolation guard & smoke render
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Consolidate render tests; training never imports/instantiates renderer; full-scene smoke render.

**Files:** create tests/test_render_isolation.py, tests/test_render_smoke.py

**Verify:** full suite (>=409 + new) PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_render_isolation.py", "tests/test_render_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["training renderer-free", "theme-switch render", "full-scene smoke present()", "upscale 1280x720", "suite green"]}
```
